Tests if the prototype of Number is Function.prototype.

# Purpose
This code snippet checks the prototype chain of the `Number` object in JavaScript. It uses the `Object.getPrototypeOf` method to obtain the prototype of `Number` and assigns it to the variable `p`. The `assert` function then verifies that `p` is equal to `Function.prototype`, confirming that `Number` is a function object in JavaScript. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's prototype inheritance model.
